summary: The user is planning a trip to Europe, specifically Paris and Rome, to make up for a canceled trip earlier in the year. They are looking for affordable flights, have a budget of $800-$1,200, and are considering budget airlines. The user also shared that their stomach ulcer is healing well and mentioned dealing with lower back pain, for which they are attending physical therapy twice a week.
facts: The user is planning a trip to Paris and Rome for around 7-10 days in the fall. The user is flexible with travel dates and has a budget of $800-$1,200 for flights. The user is considering flying out of New York and is interested in a Norwegian flight from New York to Paris. The user has been going to physical therapy twice a week for lower back pain. The user is looking for resources to find error fares or cheap flights for their trip. The user is trying to stay positive and focus on getting their health back on track.
